text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is in the middle of training for
the fast approaching spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Yet she asks to meet on Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Here... I would like you to have this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're quite welcome... This chocolate is quite
popular, you know. There's a six-month wait for
orders.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'd like for you to try it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, there's no enthusiasm in Mejiro
McQueen's voice. I wonder what's the matter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chocolate... Sugar... It dawns on me.
choice_data_list: Do you want to share it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: N-no, that's quite all right! Don't mind me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I admit, I am a little curious, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm refraining from treats until I win the spring
Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, she's trying to ensure that she's in top
shape for the upcoming race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-why are you apologizing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Please, there's no need to worry about me. Enjoy
it to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to eat the chocolates at home, if only to
avoid Mejiro McQueen's longing gaze.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm refraining from treats until I win the spring
Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, she's trying to ensure that she's in top
shape for the upcoming race.
choice_data_list:
If you have just one piece per day, it shouldn't
be a problem.

If you have just one piece per day, it shouldn't
be a problem.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Do you think so? Well, if it's only one piece, then
surely...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Wait just a minute! Why are you spoiling me like
this?!
choice_data_list: Because I get the feeling you love sweets.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah! I-it's like you can see straight into my soul!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Very well, then! I admit defeat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If you insist, I suppose I could chalk it up to peer
pressure.
choice_data_list: More like "choc" it up. Get it?
More like "choc" it up. Get it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well aren't you funny.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In all seriousness, I really have heard wonderful
things about this chocolate. I can't wait to try
it! ♪
